title: Table Widget Update View

posts.author: Stowl (Nicholas Lee)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

New member; long time lurker.

I have been working on creating a portfolio to monitor multiple, independent projects. I am able to view all the project items of any of the added projects by selecting the Project Overview and the Table Widget. From this widget, I am able to make pretty much any change I would like, and then it gets reflected onto the project page itself.

The problem I am coming across is that when I click on the Update bubble, the Item Task Page opens up instead. I am unable to see what updates there are for an item; I can only see that there is an update present. Is there a way to see the project item updates (and also add updates) from the Table Widget view?
